text.title: Supply Chain Risk — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a `LibraryRiskReport` for a single library evaluated against the 7-signal checklist.

list.item: `signals` — array of 7 objects {name, score 0-3, evidence_source_url, evidence_quote_or_number}

antipattern.reason: Unsourced scores invite hallucination. URL is the falsifier.
License veto overrides aggregate. SSPL / proprietary stops the adoption regardless of other signals.
Stale data cannot support a green decision. Refresh CVE/release data before reporting.
Threshold violation. Yellow / red must NOT route to adopt.

list.item: Adjust signal score thresholds via `templates/license-allowlist.yaml` and `templates/risk-thresholds.yaml`.
Tag evaluation as "ecosystem-blessed exception" with explicit override field (still requires log).
Cache GitHub/OSV responses for < 24h with timestamp in evidence.
Decision matches threshold AND license veto.
Remediation consistent with decision (no green → fork-pin).
